steps.title: Center fluorite's number
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize fluorite's Mohs scale number. The relevant note states that fluorite has a Mohs scale number of 4.

steps.title: Reject off-focus choices
steps.content:
• Choice A centers quartz and scratching ability.
  • Choice B omits fluorite entirely.
  • Choice D discusses ordering minerals without giving fluorite's number.

steps.title: State the number directly
steps.content: The remaining choice begins by saying fluorite has a Mohs scale number of 4 and then explains that number relative to gypsum and quartz. The answer is C.
